goal: Land card status lifecycle management by adding a formal policy doc, aligning card status validation enum, and marking current playable content/cards entries as active.
constraints: Keep changes minimal and focused on card status policy/data validation only.
Do not delete card assets; use status transitions instead.
Preserve existing card IDs and gameplay fields.
deliverables: A card status policy document under docs/content.
Updated card structure validator status enum matching the policy.
All current content/cards JSON files set to active status for current playable baseline.
